import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';
import { InventoryPage } from '../pages/InventoryPage';
import { LoginPage } from '../pages/LoginPage';
import { getRecord } from '../data/test-data';

test.describe('Login — 16 scenarios', () => {
  test('Verify that a user receives an order confirmation when completing checkout end-to-end.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1964
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    const inventoryPage = new InventoryPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/inventory\.html/);
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toHaveText(/Products/i);
    await inventoryPage.verifyInventoryLoaded();
  });

  test('Verify that tax and shipping are reflected in the order total when completing checkout.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1965
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('Verify that the business goal is satisfied when the primary success path is exercised.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1966
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    const inventoryPage = new InventoryPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/inventory\.html/);
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toHaveText(/Products/i);
    await inventoryPage.verifyInventoryLoaded();
  });

  test('Verify that functional requirements are satisfied when the primary success path is exercised.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1968
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    const inventoryPage = new InventoryPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/inventory\.html/);
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toHaveText(/Products/i);
    await inventoryPage.verifyInventoryLoaded();
  });

  test('Verify that the user can log in when valid credentials are provided.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1969
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    const inventoryPage = new InventoryPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/inventory\.html/);
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toHaveText(/Products/i);
    await inventoryPage.verifyInventoryLoaded();
  });

  test('Verify that the user sees the list of available products when login is successful.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1970
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    const inventoryPage = new InventoryPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/inventory\.html/);
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toHaveText(/Products/i);
    await inventoryPage.verifyInventoryLoaded();
  });

  test('Verify that the user can add one or more products to the shopping cart when browsing products.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1971
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    const inventoryPage = new InventoryPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="shopping-cart-link"]')).toBeVisible();
    await inventoryPage.verifyInventoryLoaded();
  });

  test('Verify that the shopping cart displays the selected products with the correct quantity when items are added.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1972
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="shopping-cart-link"]')).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('Verify that the user can proceed to checkout when the cart contains products.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1973
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('Verify that the application displays an order summary when the user reaches the final checkout step.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1975
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('Verify that the user can complete the purchase when all checkout steps are satisfied.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1976
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('Verify that the shopping cart is rejected when invalid credentials are provided during login.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1978
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login('invalid_user', process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter an invalid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="error"]')).toBeVisible();
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="error"]')).toContainText('do not match');
    await expect(page).toHaveURL('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
  });

  test('Verify that the user can log out successfully when the purchase is completed.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1979
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page).toHaveURL('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="login-button"]')).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('Verify that business rules are satisfied when the primary success path is exercised.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1980
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    const inventoryPage = new InventoryPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/inventory\.html/);
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toHaveText(/Products/i);
    await inventoryPage.verifyInventoryLoaded();
  });

  test('Verify that the expected outcome is achieved when the primary success path is exercised.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1985
    const user = getRecord("valid_users");

    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    const inventoryPage = new InventoryPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login(user.username ?? '', user.password ?? process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter a valid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/inventory\.html/);
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="title"]')).toHaveText(/Products/i);
    await inventoryPage.verifyInventoryLoaded();
  });

  test('Verify that the end-to-end purchase flow is rejected when invalid credentials are provided.', async ({ page }) => {
    // @tc:TC1986
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await page.goto('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    await loginPage.login('invalid_user', process.env.TEST_PASSWORD ?? '');

    throw new Error("Unsupported step — Script Gen could not emit a grounded action for: \"Enter an invalid login-button in the login-button field\". Fix the test case or add support; never ship a half-generated spec.");

    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="error"]')).toBeVisible();
    await expect(page.locator('[data-test="error"]')).toContainText('do not match');
    await expect(page).toHaveURL('https://www.saucedemo.com/');
  });
});
